basic_details.job_title: IIM Lucknow Programme Attendant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (IIM Lucknow)
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 55 years Age Relaxation: As per Central Government rules for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD candidates.

qualification.details: Candidate should have passed the XII examination from a recognized board/ institution. Candidate should have minimum 15 years' experience from recognized Gym or Sports Institutions or reputed Government/ Academic Institution. Candidate should have certification from any reputed Institution in the field of Physical Training/Fitness area. Candidate should have participation in International or National level in Bodybuilding or Powerlifting sports. Candidate should have sound knowledge in conducting the fitness/ Gym classes. Candidate should have knowledge of medical exercise which can improve the health of every individual.

salary_details.details: Consolidated emoluments of Rs. 37,980/- per month. (Rs. 34,000 + HRA fixed 3,980/-)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Lucknow Programme Attendant (Gym Instructor) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Lucknow to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIM Lucknow Programme Attendant (Gym Instructor) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Lucknow Programme Attendant (Gym Instructor) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form is 30th June 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical glitches.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed the XII examination from a recognized board or institution to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Programme Attendant (Gym Instructor) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 55 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Central Government rules for eligible categories.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this contract position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive consolidated emoluments of Rs. 37,980/- per month, which includes a basic salary of Rs. 34,000 and a fixed HRA of Rs. 3,980.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Programme Attendant (Gym Instructor) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Programme Attendant (Gym Instructor) position at IIM Lucknow.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online only. No other mode of application will be accepted.

faq.question: Q7. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job opportunity at IIM Lucknow.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Programme Attendant (Gym Instructor) role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Personal Interview and/or a Skill test.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article. The official website of IIM Lucknow is also provided.
